title: T-068 — Docs: TEC-052 Cost Import from D365 prototype gap brief
prompt: Write engineering brief for missing TEC-052 'Cost Import from D365' prototype per §11.5 [NO-PROTOTYPE-YET]. Output: design/specs/TEC-052-cost-import-d365.md covering: D365 cost pull endpoint -> diff preview table (current vs incoming, percent delta, source) -> batch confirm with audit note. Cross-link to T-028 pull worker and T-021 cost write path. Until prototype lands, T3-ui implementation is OUT OF SCOPE for Phase 1.

pipeline_inputs.details: Document diff preview row schema (current cost, incoming cost, delta, source), the batch-confirm guardrails (V-TEC-53 high-variance approver), and audit note format.
acceptance_criteria: Given the brief, when reviewed, then diff preview schema, V-TEC-53 enforcement, and audit-note flow are specified.
Given the brief, when read by a designer, then a labelled prototype can be produced.
risk_red_lines: Do not require live D365 access for this doc.
